data.title: Investors of Sprouts Farmers Market urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP due to losses between June 4, 2025 - Oct 29, 2025. Deadline approaching. Contact for options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Sprouts to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in Sprouts within the period of June 4, 2025, to October 29, 2025, and wish to discuss your options, please contact him for assistance.

data.title: KINF launches "Ready, Set, Restock" as 96% of school supplies deplete before winter break. Time for mid-year support.
data.description: Around 96% of school supplies donated do not last the entire school year, with many running out before winter break. This highlights the urgent requirement for a mid-year replenishment for students and educators. The announcement was made by the Kids In Need Foundation (KINF) in Little Canada, Minnesota on December 4, 2025.

data.title: March of Dimes Sports Luncheon raises $1.4M to support maternal and infant health, honoring Jason Kelce, Katie Ledecky, and Steve Phelps.
data.description: Today in New York, March of Dimes organized its 42nd Annual New York Sports Luncheon, where over 500 prominent figures from the sports, media, and business sectors gathered to contribute towards maternal and infant health. The event successfully raised $1.4 million, highlighting the strong support for the cause.

data.title: Investors of Marex Group between May 16, 2024 and August 5, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP before deadline.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors impacted by Marex to reach out to him for a consultation regarding their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Marex within the period of May 16, 2024, to August 5, 2025, you are encouraged to contact Mr. Wilson directly to discuss your legal situation and potential courses of action.

data.title: Global smart cards market to reach $16.85+ Billion by 2030 with a 6.02% CAGR driven by demand for secure payment solutions and advancements in financial sectors.
data.description: A new report, "Smart Cards Market - Forecasts from 2025 to 2030," is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Global Smart Cards Market is anticipated to increase from USD 12.585 billion in 2025 to USD 16.857 billion by 2030, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.02%. The market is poised for notable expansion due to the growing need for secure payment methods, technological progress in finance and banking industries, and the increasing adoption of smart card technology worldwide.

data.title: AI revolutionizes pharma & biotech sectors, reshaping investment landscapes for 2025. VanEck’s BBH ETF analysis reveals.
data.description: According to a recent analysis by VanEck’s BBH ETF, artificial intelligence (AI) is revolutionizing the pharmaceutical and biotech sectors. The technology is driving significant innovation and restructuring investment environments within these industries. AI's impact is evident in the increasing number of companies and research institutions leveraging its capabilities to propel advancements in drug discovery, development, and healthcare. This transformative trend underscores the shift towards AI-powered solutions, with a growing number of companies embracing its potential benefits.

data.title: BTC falls to $90K after rejecting key $93.5K, despite strong US jobs data and Fed rate-cut bets.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin dropped to around $90,000 following the release of robust US employment figures. Bitcoin did not respond positively to hopes of a Federal Reserve interest rate reduction, and failed to turn the yearly opening value into a level of support.

data.title: Innovator from Etobicoke, ON, creates LAP CASE to safeguard laptops in field; aims to prevent damage and loss.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on December 4, 2025, an inventor from Etobicoke, ON, Canada discussed the creation of the LAP CASE, a solution aimed at improving laptop security in various environments. The inventor expressed the need for a more effective way to safeguard and utilize laptops in the field or at worksites. The LAP CASE design addresses this concern by preventing computers from getting bumped and potentially falling out. This innovative product showcases the inventor's dedication to enhancing laptop protection and usability.

data.title: Johnson Controls announces $0.40 quarterly dividend per share of common stock, payable Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: In Cork, Ireland on December 4, 2025, Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI) announced that their board of directors has given the green light for a regular quarterly dividend of $0.40 per common stock share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid out on January 16, 2026. Johnson Controls International plc is recognized as a prominent player in the realm of intelligent, healthy, and eco-friendly buildings.

data.title: Probe Pin Market projected to reach $1.08 billion by 2032, with a CAGR of 6.9%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it has been reported that the worldwide Probe Pin Market is anticipated to hit $0.68 billion by 2025 and is expected to soar to $1.08 billion by 2032, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.9%. The market analysis involves exploring 155 Tables and 70 Figures across 250 Pages.

data.title: Valuables insurance market to reach $2.6B by 2024 and $5.1B by 2034 globally at 6.6% CAGR due to high-value asset ownership.
data.description: The valuable item insurance market on a global scale is witnessing swift expansion as a result of the growing possession of high-worth personal and business assets like jewelry, fine art, collectibles, and luxury watches. This surge is propelled by a heightened consumer consciousness towards safeguarding assets, with the market experiencing significant numbers in terms of value and coverage.
Fear & Greed Index: 37/100 - Fear

data.title: Dollar General stock hits 52-week high with $10.65B sales, 4.6% increase, and 29.9% gross profit margin.
data.description: Dollar General Corporation's (NYSE: DG) stock experienced a rise following the announcement of its third-quarter fiscal 2025 results, surpassing expectations and prompting a boost in its full-year guidance. The company reported net sales of $10.65 billion, closely aligning with the anticipated $10.64 billion. The uptick in sales by 4.6% was fueled by positive sales from new establishments and growth in existing store sales, counterbalanced by the impact of store closures. Same-store sales surged by 2.5% compared to Q3 2024, attributable to a 2.5% hike in customer visits alongside consistent average transaction amounts. Sales growth encompassed consumables, seasonal items, home products, and apparel. Gross profit margin scaled to 29.9%, marking a 107 basis points increase propelled by amplified inventory markups and reduced shrink, though offset by a heightened LIFO provision. Operating profit demonstrated an increase during the specified quarter.

data.title: Geoscience enrollment down 30%, AAPG launches campaign to support future workforce and energy innovations.
data.description: The American Association of Petroleum Geologists (AAPG) has introduced new chapter kits and revitalized the Imperial Barrel Award program. Emphasizing the importance of investing in the future of geoscientists and technologies for sustainable energy systems, AAPG made this announcement in Tulsa, Oklahoma on December 4, 2025. The organization urges the industry to support the development of young geoscientists and the innovations necessary for tomorrow's energy solutions.

data.title: RTX's Raytheon partners with AWS to enhance space services, boosting mission results using cloud tools. Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Raytheon, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), has announced a strategic collaboration agreement with Amazon Web Services (AWS) aimed at enhancing mission results and program performance through the use of advanced cloud-based tools and technologies. This expanded relationship, announced in Aurora, Colorado, on December 4, 2025, is expected to bring significant improvements in achievement metrics and operational efficiency through the strategic application of cloud technologies.

data.title: GENinCode PLC partners with Thermo Fisher Scientific to distribute CARDIO inCode-Score test for genetic heart disease screening in US, Europe, Middle East, and Africa regions. Test uses DNA from saliva/blood to identify heart disease risk. TMO shows weaker market performance.
data.description: A new partnership has been announced between UK-based company GENinCode PLC and Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc (NYSE: TMO). The collaboration involves the manufacturing, selling, and distribution of the CARDIO inCode-Score test. Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc is currently experiencing a decrease in market performance. The agreement encompasses regions such as the U.S., Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. The CARDIO inCode-Score test is a validated polygenic risk score (PRS) that utilizes DNA from a saliva or blood sample to assess an individual's genetic predisposition to heart disease. This information can aid in implementing preventive measures like lifestyle adjustments or appropriate treatments. Prior to obtaining approval from the U.S. Food & Drug Administration (FDA), laboratories will introduce the CARDIO inCode-Score as a Lab Developed test. For more details, refer to the complete article on a financial news platform.

data.title: G-SHOCK launches G-STEEL "Modern Industrial" Series in Dec 2025, emphasizing simplicity and toughness.
data.description: Casio America, Inc. has introduced the G-STEEL Modern Industrial Series on December 4, 2025. This collection blends simplicity, beauty, and G-SHOCK durability. Embracing the ethos of "less, but better," the metal-clad series offers a contemporary fusion of style and toughness.
